# zstack_port_mirror (Resource)

Manages a port mirror in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mirror_network_uuid` (String) The UUID of the mirror network.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the port mirror.
- `name` (String) The name of the port mirror.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the port mirror.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the port mirror.
